2008.issue: [S2008] Version 1.0.9 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3032.issue: [W3032] "test-and-release.yml" run triggered by tag "v1.0.9" for current release 1.0.9 failed [run #432](https://github.com/obakuhl/ioBroker.egigeozone2/actions/runs/18063298676).

3045.issue: [S3045] "test-and-release.yml": job "check-and-lint" should enable linting by setting "lint: true" for "ioBroker/testing-action-check@v1".

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (lib/utils.js, [main.js](https://github.com/obakuhl/ioBroker.egigeozone2/blob/master/main.js)). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/obakuhl/ioBroker.egigeozone2/blob/master/io-package.json).

5063.issue: [W5063] JSON formatting in "io-package.json" is hard to read (mixed indentation). Please use consistent indentation and proper line breaks.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/mainTab/items/secure" attribute "label" uses key "Secure (HTTPS)" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

6021.issue: [W6021] `## License` is not the last section in [README.md](https://github.com/obakuhl/ioBroker.egigeozone2/blob/master/README.md). The license section should be the last section.

6025.issue: [E6025] [README.md](https://github.com/obakuhl/ioBroker.egigeozone2/blob/master/README.md) must contain exactly one H1 heading, but found 0.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process issue [[#135] "Migration to ESLint 9 and @iobroker/eslint-config"](https://github.com/obakuhl/ioBroker.egigeozone2/issues/135)

0071.issue: [S0071] No devDependency for "@iobroker/eslint-config" found. Consider migrating to the shared ESLint config.

0073.issue: [S0073] "eslint":"^10.4.1" is >= 9.0.0 but "@iobroker/eslint-config" is not used. Consider migrating to "@iobroker/eslint-config".

0087.issue: [S0087] Missing "/tsconfig.json". Consider adding it for proper type checking (see ioBroker.examples for examples).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.9.3" at [package.json](https://github.com/obakuhl/ioBroker.egigeozone2/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
